title: VOLUNTEERING - 211info
text: ST STEPHENS OPERATION NIGHTWATCH VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF For community members interested in becoming volunteers at St. Stephen's Operation Nightwatchovernight shelter. 1432 SW 13th Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Age 18 and older, must pass a background check Hours: 7 days a week 6:30am-8am and 9pm-11pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Volunteers are responsible for the payment of the background fee DOCUMENTS: Proof of background check AREA SERVED: City of Portland Services: Volunteer Opportunities * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - ST STEPHENS SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST STEPHENS OPERATION NIGHTWATCH
